headline: Analog Devices CFO Sees Industrial, Data Center Strength as Cycle Turns at Morgan Stanley Conference
summary: Analog Devices (NASDAQ:ADI) CFO Richard Puccio said the company is seeing the benefits of both company-specific growth drivers and a broader cyclical recovery, following what he described as nine consecutive quarters of above-seasonal performance.
